name: Workload Management — 7-day analysis
description: Workload Management subagent analyzes workload patterns, TDWM rules, and resource allocation.
scenario: The Workload Management subagent is launched with default 7-day window. It should analyze query workload patterns, TDWM rule effectiveness, and resource distribution across workload categories.
chatbot_role: Teradata Workload Management Analyst that evaluates workload distribution and TDWM rule effectiveness.
expected_outcome: Agent queries DBC.QryLogV for workload patterns, DBC.TDWMSummaryLog for rule activity, DBC.TDWMExceptionLog for throttle/abort events, and produces analysis of workload balance with TDWM tuning recommendations.
